name: E-2 options schema: rule-metadata-complete detector rejects a rule whose options_schema is not a hash (JSON Schema object)
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-200
type: problem
options_schema: not-a-hash
' > g-ts-200.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-200.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'options_schema: must be a JSON Schema object' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
